target.rawSql: SELECT time AS time, 'Rain started' AS text FROM (SELECT time, rain_mm_hr, lag(rain_mm_hr) OVER (ORDER BY time) AS prev FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station)) q WHERE prev = 0 AND rain_mm_hr > 0

list.name: wn31_ch
list.label: Room channel (WN31)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT channel FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' ORDER BY 1

list.name: wh51_ch
list.label: Soil channel (WH51)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT channel FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wh51' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Outdoor temp
panels.description: Current outdoor air temperature. Cold side graded for Montreal winters; freeze at 0 °C.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(temp_c) AS "Outdoor" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Feels like
panels.description: Wind chill when ≤10 °C and wind ≥4.8 km/h; humidex when ≥20 °C; else air temp. Environment Canada formulas.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(CASE WHEN temp_c <= 10 AND wind_ms*3.6 >= 4.8 THEN 13.12+0.6215*temp_c-11.37*power(wind_ms*3.6,0.16)+0.3965*temp_c*power(wind_ms*3.6,0.16) WHEN temp_c >= 20 THEN temp_c+0.5555*(6.11*exp(5417.7530*(1.0/273.16-1.0/(273.15+243.04*(ln(greatest(humidity,1)/100.0)+(17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c))/(17.625-ln(greatest(humidity,1)/100.0)-(17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c)))))-10) ELSE temp_c END) AS "Feels like" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Humidity
panels.description: Outdoor relative humidity. Diverging ramp: dry (orange) ↔ wet (blue).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(humidity) AS "Humidity" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND humidity IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Wind
panels.description: Mean wind speed (km/h). Bands: 29 km/h (windy), 54 km/h (strong).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(wind_ms)*3.6 AS "Wind" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND wind_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Max gust today
panels.description: Peak daily gust (km/h) reported by the station. Resets at station-local midnight. Bucketed with max() so spikes survive.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", max(max_daily_gust_ms)*3.6 AS "Gust" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND max_daily_gust_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rain today
panels.description: Daily rain accumulator (mm). Resets at station-local midnight — see "Rain 24 h" for a reset-free rolling figure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", max(rain_daily_mm) AS "Rain today" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND rain_daily_mm IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rain 24 h
panels.description: Rolling last-24 h rainfall (from last24hrainin). Reset-free headline — at 6 a.m. this still reflects overnight rain that "Rain today" has zeroed.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", max(rain_last24h_mm) AS "Rain 24 h" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND rain_last24h_mm IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Last report
panels.description: Dead-man's switch: seconds since the newest row in weather_metrics. Green < 3 min, red ≥ 15 min → gateway/ingest/DB is down. Mirrored by the 'pipeline stale' alert.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - max(time)))::double precision AS "Last report" FROM weather_metrics WHERE station_id IN ($station)

panels.title: Temperature — outdoor vs indoor (°C)
panels.description: Hairline at 0 °C marks the freeze line. Outdoor = orange, Indoor = blue (fixed across the board).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(temp_c) AS "Outdoor", avg(temp_in_c) AS "Indoor" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: All sensors — temperature (°C)
panels.description: Every temperature sensor on one chart: outdoor + indoor (WS69/GW3000) and each WN31 room channel. Adapts automatically as WN31 channels appear or drop out.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", 'Outdoor' AS metric, avg(temp_c) AS value FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval), 'Indoor', avg(temp_in_c) FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_in_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval), 'Room '||channel, avg(temp_c) FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' AND channel IN ($wn31_ch) AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_c IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, channel ORDER BY 1

panels.title: All sensors — humidity (%)
panels.description: Every humidity sensor on one chart: outdoor + indoor and each WN31 room channel.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", 'Outdoor' AS metric, avg(humidity) AS value FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND humidity IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval), 'Indoor', avg(humidity_in) FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND humidity_in IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval), 'Room '||channel, avg(humidity) FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' AND channel IN ($wn31_ch) AND station_id IN ($station) AND humidity IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, channel ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Comfort — dew point / wind chill / humidex (°C)
panels.description: Derived (Magnus dew point; EC wind chill valid ≤10 °C & wind ≥4.8 km/h; EC humidex ≥20 °C). Wind chill / humidex draw only where valid.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(243.04*(ln(greatest(humidity,1)/100.0)+(17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c))/(17.625-ln(greatest(humidity,1)/100.0)-(17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c))) AS "Dew point", avg(CASE WHEN temp_c <= 10 AND wind_ms*3.6 >= 4.8 THEN 13.12+0.6215*temp_c-11.37*power(wind_ms*3.6,0.16)+0.3965*temp_c*power(wind_ms*3.6,0.16) END) AS "Wind chill", avg(CASE WHEN temp_c >= 20 THEN temp_c+0.5555*(6.11*exp(5417.7530*(1.0/273.16-1.0/(273.15+243.04*(ln(greatest(humidity,1)/100.0)+(17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c))/(17.625-ln(greatest(humidity,1)/100.0)-(17.625*temp_c)/(243.04+temp_c)))))-10) END) AS "Humidex" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Humidity — outdoor vs indoor (%)
panels.description: Outdoor = orange, Indoor = blue (same identity as the temperature panel).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(humidity) AS "Outdoor", avg(humidity_in) AS "Indoor" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Pressure — relative vs absolute (hPa)
panels.description: Relative = sea-level-adjusted (baromrelin); Absolute = station pressure (baromabsin).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(pressure_hpa) AS "Relative", avg(pressure_abs_hpa) AS "Absolute" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Pressure tendency (3 h)
panels.description: Change in relative pressure over the last 3 h. Falling (blue) → unsettled; rising (orange) → clearing. A fall > ~1 hPa/3h often precedes a storm.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, (SELECT pressure_hpa FROM weather_metrics WHERE station_id IN ($station) AND pressure_hpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT pressure_hpa FROM weather_metrics WHERE station_id IN ($station) AND pressure_hpa IS NOT NULL AND time <= now() - interval '3 hours' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1) AS "3h change"

panels.title: Wind speed & gust (km/h)
panels.description: Wind = mean; Gust = per-bucket max; Max daily gust = station's daily peak (dashed). Threshold lines at 29 / 54 km/h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(wind_ms)*3.6 AS "Wind", max(gust_ms)*3.6 AS "Gust", max(max_daily_gust_ms)*3.6 AS "Max daily gust" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Wind direction (compass sector)
panels.description: Bucketed with last(wind_dir) mapped to 16 compass points — reads as bands of 'wind from the NW all morning', with no 359°→1° wrap spike.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", (ARRAY['N','NNE','NE','ENE','E','ESE','SE','SSE','S','SSW','SW','WSW','W','WNW','NW','NNW'])[floor(((last(wind_dir, time)+11.25)::numeric % 360)/22.5)::int + 1] AS "Wind from" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND wind_dir IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Wind rose — time share by direction
panels.description: Poor-man's wind rose: share of samples the wind blew from each of 16 sectors over the selected range (core panel, no plugin).

targets.rawSql: SELECT (ARRAY['N','NNE','NE','ENE','E','ESE','SE','SSE','S','SSW','SW','WSW','W','WNW','NW','NNW'])[s + 1] AS sector, count(*) AS "Samples" FROM (SELECT floor(((wind_dir+11.25)::numeric % 360)/22.5)::int AS s FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND wind_dir IS NOT NULL) q GROUP BY s ORDER BY s

panels.title: UV index
panels.description: Bucketed mean UV. Threshold colours follow the WHO UV-index scale.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(uv) AS "UV" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND uv IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rain rate (mm/h)
panels.description: Instantaneous rate (rainratein). Bucketed with max() so short bursts survive downsampling.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", max(rain_mm_hr) AS "Rate" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Solar radiation (W/m²)
panels.description: Downwelling shortwave irradiance. Split from UV (own panel) so neither scale distorts the other.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(solar_wm2) AS "Solar" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND solar_wm2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rain today — accumulation (mm)
panels.description: Daily accumulator (dailyrainin), step line. Resets at station-local midnight. Bucketed with max().

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", max(rain_daily_mm) AS "Daily total" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Vapor-pressure deficit (kPa)
panels.description: Gateway-computed VPD — atmospheric drying power (plant/greenhouse metric).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(vpd_kpa) AS "VPD" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) AND vpd_kpa IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Rain accumulation — weekly / monthly / yearly / all-time (mm)
panels.description: Station accumulators. All-time (totalrainin) is the reset-proof reference the others derive from. Each bucketed with max().

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", max(rain_weekly_mm) AS "Weekly", max(rain_monthly_mm) AS "Monthly", max(rain_yearly_mm) AS "Yearly", max(rain_total_mm) AS "All-time" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Room $wn31_ch temp
panels.description: WN31 channel $wn31_ch air temperature.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(temp_c) AS "Temp" FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' AND channel = $wn31_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND temp_c IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Room $wn31_ch RH
panels.description: WN31 channel $wn31_ch relative humidity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(humidity) AS "RH" FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' AND channel = $wn31_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND humidity IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Room $wn31_ch battery
panels.description: WN31 channel $wn31_ch battery flag (0=OK, 1=LOW).

targets.rawSql: SELECT batt FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' AND channel = $wn31_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND batt IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Room $wn31_ch — temp & humidity
panels.description: WN31 channel $wn31_ch history. Temp (left axis) / RH (right axis).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(temp_c) AS "Temp", avg(humidity) AS "RH" FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wn31' AND channel = $wn31_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Soil $wh51_ch moisture
panels.description: WH51 channel $wh51_ch calibrated soil moisture %.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(soil_pct) AS "Moisture" FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wh51' AND channel = $wh51_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND soil_pct IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Soil $wh51_ch battery
panels.description: WH51 channel $wh51_ch battery voltage. Replace below ~1.2 V.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", min(batt) AS "Battery" FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wh51' AND channel = $wh51_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND batt IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Soil $wh51_ch — calibrated % & raw AD
panels.description: WH51 channel $wh51_ch. Kept dual-axis deliberately: this panel IS the calibration check — divergence between % and raw AD is the message.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", avg(soil_pct) AS "Moisture %", avg(soil_ad) AS "Raw AD" FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wh51' AND channel = $wh51_ch AND station_id IN ($station) AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: WS69 array battery
panels.description: Outdoor WS69 (WH65) array battery flag (0=OK, 1=LOW). Replace the 2×AA backup cells.

targets.rawSql: SELECT wh65_batt FROM weather_metrics WHERE station_id IN ($station) AND wh65_batt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Reports per 5 min
panels.description: Ingest liveness: rows landed in weather_metrics per bucket. Flatlines to zero when the gateway, ingest service, or DB stops.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", count(*) AS "Reports" FROM weather_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND station_id IN ($station) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Soil battery (V) — all channels
panels.description: WH51 battery voltage over time with 1.2 / 1.35 V threshold lines.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(time, $__interval) AS "time", 'CH' || channel AS metric, min(batt) AS value FROM sensor_channels WHERE sensor_type='wh51' AND station_id IN ($station) AND batt IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY 1, channel ORDER BY 1
